name: @animal-island-components-sa2kit/electron
description: Electron desktop entry for animal-island-components-sa2kit (re-exports react + desktop-only components)

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --external electron --external react --external react-dom --external @animal-island-components-sa2kit/react --external @animal-island-components-sa2kit/shared --clean
